title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, Associate Professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI fundamentals by hand at human speed, with emphasis on mathematical foundations over tool-chasing, builds durable skills that outlast hype cycles. He contends that people shape AI rather than AI reshaping people.
